# PawCharms

> PawCharms makes handcrafted, waterproof dog collars with 5-second swap charms, designed and made in Vilnius, Lithuania. The brand name for the product line is Žavesys.

## What we sell

- **Customisable dog collars** — silicone, waterproof, available in 4 colours (Sage green, Sky blue, Blossom pink, Honey yellow). Collar sets from €28 (includes 5 charms).
- **Swap charms** — 12 charm designs (star, heart, paw, flower, Z-charm, and more). €6 each. Attach and swap in 5 seconds, no tools needed.
- **Engraving** — personalise your collar with your dog's name.
- **Sizes** — XS (20–28 cm), S (28–36 cm), M (36–44 cm), L (44–54 cm).

## Key features

- Waterproof silicone material
- 5-second charm swap system — no clips, no tools
- Handcrafted in Vilnius, Lithuania
- Free shipping on orders over €50

## Key pages

- Homepage: https://pawcharms.lt
- Shop all products: https://pawcharms.lt/products
- Collar configurator: https://pawcharms.lt/configure

## Company

- Name: PawCharms
- Brand: Žavesys
- Location: Vilnius, Lithuania
- Contact: hello@pawcharms.lt
